description: Space, Cybersecurity, Operations, and Resilience. SCOR is a taxonomic and ontological namespace that classifies confirmed and modeled indicators of compromise, indicators of attack, attack paths, threats, detection signatures, and resilience measures along five orthogonal layers - environment (PCE), segment (SEG), service plane (SVC), asset class (AST), and analytic dimension (AN). The schema is designed for cross-domain incidents that IT-centric taxonomies cannot express coherently, including UAS and counter-UAS engagements (Gatwick 2018, Abqaiq-Khurais 2019, Tower 22 2024), subsea fibre disruptions (Matsu 2023, Red Sea AAE-1/EIG/Seacom 2024, Baltic C-Lion1/BCS East-West 2024, Estlink 2 2024), and orbital/ground-segment cyber and signals events (Viasat KA-SAT AcidRain 2022, GNSS spoofing across the Black Sea and Strait of Hormuz, Cosmos 1408 ASAT debris 2021). Pairs with the MISP and Maltego SCOR workbench for tag-driven pivots across the five layers. Audience: Space, Cybersecurity, Operations, and Resilience Platform Professionals. Contact: william.o.ferguson@ethicallyhacking.space. Homepage: https://start.ethicallyhacking.space. Last_updated: 2026-05-16. Layers: ['PCE', 'SEG', 'SVC', 'AST', 'AN']. Environments: ['Terrestrial', 'Aerial', 'Aquatic', 'Orbital', 'Deep Space']. Segments: ['User', 'Ground', 'Launch', 'Link', 'Low Altitude', 'High Altitude', 'Near Space', 'Aquatic', 'Space', 'Deep Space']. Services: ['Control Plane', 'Data Plane', 'Hybrid']. Assets: ['Software', 'Firmware', 'Hardware', 'Data', 'Signals', 'Hybrid']. AN_dimensions: ['IOC (confirmed)', 'IOC (modeled)', 'IOA', 'Attack Path', 'Threat', 'Detection', 'Resilience']. License: CC BY 4.0. Namespace_display: SCOR. Namespace_long: Space, Cybersecurity, Operations, and Resilience. Notes: Descriptor only. The matching cluster provides the visible overview entries.. Repo: https://github.com/h4ck32n4u75. Scope: Converged space systems. Steward: H4CK32N4U75®.
